name: mcphire
description: MCPHire — MCP-first IT job board for Russia. 65,000+ active vacancies. Agent-first M2M onboarding: give Claude mcphire.com, it discovers the MCP endpoint, answers 150 questions from your local context, shows approval screen, and auto-generates your CV.

authentication.notes: MCP stream has no bearer. Discovery/search tools (search_jobs, get_job_details, get_salary_stats, get_registration_questions) and sentinel-backed writes (apply_to_job, get_my_applications) attribute to a shared MCP sentinel user derived from uuid5(NAMESPACE_DNS, 'mcp.mcphire.com'). Profile-scoped tools (list_my_matches, get_my_cv) require profile_id (UUID) in payload — the UUID functions as a secret returned only to the registering client. get_verification_status takes claim_token instead. register_profile is open but rate-limited 3/day per IP and rejects requests without consent_granted=true. Per-profile bearer tokens are post-MVP.

onboarding: 1. Call get_registration_questions() — receive 150 questions in 11 sections.
2. Answer each from user's local context (MD files, git log, ~/.claude/memory, prior conversations).
3. Attach provenance (source_excerpt + confidence) for 8 critical fields (seniority, years, comp, etc).
4. Collect observed_facts (SPO triples) as side-channel during reading.
5. SHOW USER an approval screen with all answers + facts. Wait for explicit 'ok'. Never skip this step.
7. User inserts returned claim_token into GitHub bio / LinkedIn / Gist (or Claude updates bio via github-MCP).
9. Show user cv_url — their auto-generated resume, ready to share.

10. Telegram linking (live). Ask the user to open @mcphire_match_bot in Telegram and send /link <claim_token> to wire the profile to instant match pushes. Webhook at https://bot.mcphire.com (TLS active since 2026-04-21).
heartbeat: At each conversation open, call list_my_matches(profile_id, since=last_check).

Real matches are returned: union of notification_deliveries (append-only log) and notification_queue (pending). Each match carries score, reasons, job metadata (title, company, salary, slug) and a source flag ('delivered' | 'queued'). Instant pushes also fire into Telegram the moment a matching vacancy is indexed.
Stay silent if empty — no spam.

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Search 65,000+ active IT jobs from Russian companies. Filters: query (text), city, salary_from (RUB/month), skills (comma-separated ILIKE), remote (bool → work_format IN remote/hybrid), level (junior|middle|senior|lead), limit, offset.

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Get full job details by UUID. Requires job_id (UUID only — slug lookup not supported by this tool).

tools.name: get_salary_stats
tools.description: Aggregate salary stats grouped by level and currency. Optional category keyword narrows by job title (ILIKE). Returns averages + counts per (level,currency).

tools.name: apply_to_job
tools.description: Submit application (attributed to sentinel MCP user) with optional cover_letter. Requires job_id (UUID). Rate-limited to 10/hour.

tools.name: get_my_applications
tools.description: List applications made by the sentinel MCP user in this session. No filter params.

tools.name: get_registration_questions
tools.description: Returns the 150-question catalog for M2M onboarding. Each question has id, section (stack|experience|style|availability|social|artifacts|comp|intent|red_flags|domain|agent), text_ru, type, options, matchable, provenance_required, hint_for_agent.

tools.name: register_profile
tools.description: Create an agent profile AFTER explicit user approval. Requires consent_granted=true + provenance for critical fields. Returns profile_id, claim_token, cv_url.

tools.name: get_verification_status
tools.description: Check whether claim_token has been detected in proof_url bio. Triggers immediate re-check in addition to 15-min cron.

tools.name: list_my_matches
tools.description: Heartbeat endpoint — call at conversation start. Returns real matches from both the append-only notification_deliveries log and the live notification_queue, joined with jobs + companies. Each match includes job_id, title, company, salary_from/to, currency, work_format, slug, score, reasons (why we matched), matched_at, source ('delivered' | 'queued'). profile_id must be a UUID returned by register_profile.

tools.name: get_my_cv
tools.description: Returns CV URL + photo + social links + observed_facts summary for the user's auto-generated resume.
